calendarFaqs.q: How can I add Fresno Unified School District's school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: To add the Fresno Unified School District 2026-2027 calendar to Google Calendar, download the .ics file from this page, then open Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & Export → Import, and upload the file. All school holidays, breaks, and key dates will appear on your calendar automatically.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fresno Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Monday, August 17, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Fresno Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Thursday, June 10, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fresno Unified School District runs Mar 22, 2027–Mar 29, 2027, 8 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Fresno Unified School District runs Dec 21, 2026–Jan 8, 2027, 19 days. School resumes Jan 11, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves to March 22-29 from March 30-April 6 in 2025-2026 — one week earlier, while retaining the same 8-day length.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break remains an 8-day break (March 22-29), longer than the standard 5-day break at most California unified districts.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Birthday
yearNumbers.detail: Lincoln's Birthday is observed as a separate school holiday on February 8 — one week before Presidents' Day on Feb 15, giving February two no-school Mondays.

calendarNotes:
Fresno Unified begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 17, 2026 — earlier than most California districts, allowing the year to conclude before June's peak valley heat. Spring Break runs March 22–29, 2027. The school year ends June 10, 2027. Families relocating from districts that start after Labor Day should plan enrollment, childcare, and back-to-school shopping before mid-August.

The calendar includes California-specific no-school days — Lincoln's Birthday and Cesar Chavez Day — along with District Buyback Days when teachers attend professional development and students do not attend. The major multi-day breaks are Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break; Fresno Unified does not have a Fall Break.
